AND VPM MANAGEMENT, INCORPORATED'S Re-Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus And For Immediate Stay Of Enforcement Of Ordinance IS DENIED. THE VARIOUS CONSTITUTIONAL ARGUMENTS DOES NOT END UP SUCCEEDING HERE AS MATTER OF LAW GIVEN THE UNDISPUTED FACTS AND IS NOT IMPERMISSIBLY RETROACTIVE OR THAT THE CITY'S POLICE POWER HAS BEEN DISPLACED OR THERE IS PREEMPTION ON A TAKING.
